Name: FSearchBoxStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SSearchBox

Variables.Name: TextBoxStyle
Variables.Description: Style to use for the text box part of the search box

Variables.Name: ActiveFontInfo
Variables.Description: Font to use for the text box part of the search box when a search term is entered

Variables.Name: UpArrowImage
Variables.Description: Image to use for the search "up" arrow

Variables.Name: DownArrowImage
Variables.Description: Image to use for the search "down" arrow

Variables.Name: GlassImage
Variables.Description: Image to use for the search "glass"

Variables.Name: ClearImage
Variables.Description: Image to use for the search "clear" button

Variables.Name: ImagePadding
Variables.Description: Padding to use around the images

Variables.Name: bLeftAlignButtons
Variables.Description: If true, buttons appear to the left of the search text
